title: galium parisiense f. microspermum
intro: Galium parisiense f. microspermum, also known as Small-fruited Paris-galium, is a plant species belonging to the Galium genus, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as bedstraws. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic, helping to reduce water retention and alleviate symptoms of urinary issues. The health benefits of Galium parisiense f. microspermum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Galium parisiense f. microspermum can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to support kidney function and urinary health.
